description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and manually dispatched. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.10) sequentially. For each version, check out the repository, set up Python, upgrade pip and setuptools, install dependencies from requirements.txt if available, build and install the package, and run unit tests with unittest.
